description:
This step allows you to create instructor profiles by linking them to existing employee records, ensuring a clear connection between HR data and academic responsibilities.

Start by selecting an employee to designate them as an instructor. This linkage ensures that all teaching staff are properly managed within your organizational structure and inherit the correct company association automatically.

Next, assign the courses and programs (classes or streams) that the instructor will teach. This mapping is essential for enabling core academic functionalities such as timetable generation, class scheduling, and workload distribution.

You can also mark preferred courses or programs for each instructor, helping the system optimize scheduling decisions based on teacher expertise and availability.

By completing this step, you ensure that:

Instructors are correctly mapped to subjects and classes
The timetable generation system has accurate teaching data
Academic operations such as attendance, assignments, and grading are properly aligned

This setup is a critical foundation for running your institute’s academic workflows efficiently.
name: Create Instructor records
title: Create Instructor records
